summary: Solid performance highlighted by an absolutely sick Let It Grow, captured with decent sound quality.
review: The show receives a warm endorsement – despite not being flawless, it’s considered a keeper and features standout moments, most notably a killer rendition of "Let It Grow." Reviewers didn’t comment on the technical side, so the recording is presumed to be adequately clear. Overall the musical payoff outweighs any minor imperfections.

ai_rating.rationale: One substantive 4‑star review praises the show and a key song; no concrete recording feedback, so rating reflects good musical performance with assumed decent audio.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on sound clarity or mix; presumed acceptable based on overall positive tone.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Review mentions “great moments” but gives no detailed flow analysis.
